body: Draft .github/workflows/release.yml mirroring meridian-online/finetype's release.yml — cross-target build matrix (mac arm/x86, linux arm/x86), GitHub release artefacts (tar.gz + sha256), and the homebrew-tap update job. Doesn't ship until repo is transferred and release secrets are configured, but the file lands now so the migration cutover is one tag away.

Starting on release.yml — model is .github/workflows/release.yml in meridian-online/finetype. Differences for orbit: (a) no model-download step (orbit has no ML artefact), (b) bin name is 'orbit' not 'finetype', (c) build target is -p orbit-state-cli, (d) homebrew formula update writes Formula/orbit.rb instead of finetype.rb, (e) install-site dispatch is optional pending the linux path decision.

Drafted .github/workflows/release.yml. Mirrors finetype's release.yml with three adaptations: (1) working-directory: orbit-state for cargo since the workspace is nested, (2) -p orbit-state-cli --bin orbit for the build target, (3) Formula/orbit.rb is generated inline in the update-homebrew job (covers ac-03 prep — no separate template file needed). No model-download step (orbit has no ML artefact). Windows excluded per ac-02 explicit target list. Workflow won't fire until repo lives at meridian-online/orbit AND secrets.HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN is configured — both gated on ac-01.

Make plugins/orb/skills/release/SKILL.md path-agnostic — drop the two ~/github/hughcameron/orbit references so the skill works regardless of where the user has cloned the repo. (Covers part of ac-07.)

Replaced two ~/github/hughcameron/orbit references in plugins/orb/skills/release/SKILL.md with a working-tree assertion (line 33) and dropped the redundant cd before the commit/push block (line 64). grep -rn for hughcameron/orbit and ~/github/hughcameron returns no matches in plugins/orb/, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md. README.md still has 3 hughcameron references (intentional — those describe the brew/cargo install path and will land in the README rewrite task).

Add an [Unreleased] section to CHANGELOG.md with the migration notes — flag the move to meridian-online/orbit, the new brew install path, and instructions for existing orb plugin users to re-add the marketplace from the new path. (Covers ac-09.)

Added [Unreleased] section to CHANGELOG.md (lines 5-22): migration narrative, marketplace re-add instructions for existing orb plugin users, and an 'Added' entry for the binary distribution. References decision 0018, spec orbit-distro, and card 0027 so a reader can trace context. Will become the next versioned entry when we cut the first meridian-online release tag.

Post-transfer cleanup — rewrite README install section to brew-first (macOS and linux both go through brew tap meridian-online/tap; cargo install kept under 'Build from source (contributors)'), update plugin marketplace URL to meridian-online/orbit, and update orbit-state/Cargo.toml repository metadata. Flips ac-01 (transfer done), ac-05 (linux path = same tap), ac-06 (README), and remaining part of ac-07 (README hughcameron refs).

Post-transfer cleanup landed. README install section rewritten — brew/Linuxbrew is the primary path on both platforms via 'brew tap meridian-online/tap && brew install orbit'; cargo-install moved to 'Build from source (contributors)' subsection; plugin marketplace URL → meridian-online/orbit. orbit-state/Cargo.toml repository field → meridian-online/orbit; added homepage = https://meridian.online/projects/orbit/. Local git remote rewritten and fetch confirmed. Active product surface (README, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, plugins/, orbit-state/) has zero hughcameron/orbit references. Historical references in .orbit/specs/ and .orbit/choices/ are intentional audit trail and unchanged. Flipped ac-01, ac-05, ac-06, ac-07.

Align plugin and binary versions at 0.4.2 — bump plugins/orb/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (0.4.1→0.4.2) and orbit-state/Cargo.toml workspace version (0.1.0-dev→0.4.2) in lockstep, refresh Cargo.lock, promote CHANGELOG [Unreleased] to [0.4.2] - 2026-05-08. Patch bump (preserves runway) per user preference. Sets up the v0.4.2 tag push for ac-02/03/04/10.

Versions aligned at 0.4.2. plugins/orb/.claude-plugin/plugin.json: 0.4.1 → 0.4.2. orbit-state/Cargo.toml workspace: 0.1.0-dev → 0.4.2 (Cargo.lock auto-refreshed for cli, core, mcp). Built locally: orbit --version prints 'orbit 0.4.2'. CHANGELOG [Unreleased] promoted to [0.4.2] - 2026-05-08; added a 'Changed' entry documenting the alignment jump. Saved versioning-prefer-patch memory capturing the patch-over-minor preference for plumbing changes.

Ship 0.4.3 with 'orbit canonicalise' as a first-class subcommand. Extracts the existing standalone-binary logic into orbit-state-core::canonicalise (mirrors the verify module pattern), exposes 'orbit canonicalise [--dry-run]' in the main CLI alongside 'orbit verify', keeps the orbit-canonicalise standalone binary as a thin shim. Surfaced by hydrofoil session feedback — first-time MADR authors hit byte-drift verify failures with no in-toolbox fixer in the brew binary.

Shipped. New module orbit_state_core::canonicalise (CanonicaliseReport + canonicalise_all + canonicalise_file generic). Three unit tests in core (clean substrate, drifted file rewritten, dry-run never writes) — all pass; full workspace test suite 136 tests pass. Main CLI gained 'orbit canonicalise [--dry-run] [--json]' as a hygiene subcommand alongside 'orbit verify' (short-circuited before verb dispatch, mirrors verify's output shape). Standalone orbit-canonicalise binary kept as a thin shim around the shared function. Verify error message for NotByteIdentical updated to point at the new fixer. Versions bumped to 0.4.3 (plugin.json + Cargo.toml workspace); CHANGELOG promoted with Added + Changed entries. Ready to tag v0.4.3.
